mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO doc_chunk ( doc_id, chunk_index, milvus_id, content, content_length, start_position, end_position, page_number, heading, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.docId}, #{item.chunkIndex}, #{item.milvusId}, #{item.content}, #{item.contentLength}, #{item.startPosition}, #{item.endPosition}, #{item.pageNumber}, #{item.heading}, NOW() )
